mapper.select: select count(1) from family_member where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'active' and is_deleted = '0'
select group_id from family_member where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'active' and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO family_member(group_id, user_id, role, join_time, status, is_deleted) VALUES(#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{joinTime}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM family_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update family_member set status = #{status}, exit_time = #{exitTime} where group_id = #{groupId} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT role FROM family_member WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
